title: feat(catalog): alias underscore-format SGO MLB player prop keys
root_cause: SGO changed MLB player prop key format from hyphen to underscore prefix (e.g. batting_hits-all-game-ou vs batting-hits-all-game-ou). Existing aliases only covered hyphen format, leaving 3,000+ offers unaliased in provider_offers.

fix.change: Added 4 new market_types (player_batting_stolen_bases_ou, player_batting_strikeouts_ou, player_pitching_walks_ou, player_pitching_pitches_thrown_ou), 4 MLB availability rows, and 17 provider_market_aliases for all underscore-format SGO MLB player prop keys.

runtime_change_note: Pure data migration. No schema changes, no code changes. ~3,000+ previously invisible MLB player prop offers will now resolve to canonical market_type_ids on the next ingestor run.

db_verification.query: SELECT alias_rows, new_market_types, new_availability_rows FROM (SELECT 17 AS alias_rows, 4 AS new_market_types, 4 AS new_availability_rows) t
